list.title: CodeCompactor#calculateLineImportance
list.description: Calculates the importance score for a line.

list.title: CodeCompactor#calculateSectionImportance
list.description: Calculates the importance score for a section.

list.title: CodeCompactor#compact
list.description: Compacts the content while preserving important sections and structure.

list.title: CodeCompactor#findImportantLines
list.description: Identifies important lines in the code based on patterns and context.

list.title: CodeCompactor#preserveStructure
list.description: Preserves code structure in the compacted output.

list.title: CodeCompactor#selectLines
list.description: Selects which lines to include in the compacted output.

list.title: ContentFormatter#aggregate
list.description: Aggregates multiple formatted contents into a single output.

list.title: ContentFormatter#aggregate
list.description: Aggregates the provided contents based on the specified format.

list.title: ContentFormatter#aggregateMarkdown
list.description: Aggregates contents into Markdown format, including a Table of Contents.

list.title: ContentFormatter#createAnchorId
list.description: Creates an anchor ID from a file path for markdown links.

list.title: ContentFormatter#formatContent
list.description: Formats the content of a file according to the specified format.

list.title: ContentFormatter#getLanguage
list.description: Gets the programming language associated with a file based on its extension.

list.title: ContentFormatter#sanitizeAnchor
list.description: Sanitizes a file path to create a markdown anchor.

list.title: ContentNormalizer#normalizeWhitespace
list.description: Normalizes whitespace while preserving code block formatting

list.title: ErrorHandler
list.description: A class to handle and manage errors and warnings in the application. Provides methods for error tracking, warning management, and report generation.

list.title: FileProcessingWorker#cleanup
list.description: Cleans up resources used by the worker

list.title: FileScanner#isAllowedExtension
list.description: Checks if the file has an allowed extension.

list.title: FileScanner#isCommonIgnoredDirectory
list.description: Checks if the directory name is commonly ignored (e.g., node_modules, .git).

list.title: FileScanner#traverseDirectory
list.description: Recursively traverses directories to find eligible files.

list.title: IgnoreProcessor#addPatterns
list.description: Adds additional patterns to the ignore instance. Useful for dynamically adding patterns during traversal.

list.title: IgnoreProcessor#isIgnored
list.description: Determines if a given file path should be ignored based on loaded patterns.

list.title: IgnoreProcessor#loadCustomIgnoreFiles
list.description: Loads and processes custom ignore files provided by the user.

list.title: IgnoreProcessor#loadDefaultPatterns
list.description: Loads default ignore patterns from a JSON configuration file.

list.title: IgnoreProcessor#loadIgnorePatternsFromDirectory
list.description: Loads and processes ignore patterns from a specific directory's ignore files. This method is used to handle ignore files in subdirectories during traversal.

list.title: MemoryManager#estimateMemoryRequirement
list.description: Estimates memory requirements for a given file size

list.title: MemoryManager#getRecommendedChunkSize
list.description: Gets recommended chunk size for streaming based on current memory conditions

list.title: MemoryManager#isSafeToProcess
list.description: Checks if processing a file of given size is safe

list.title: OutputAggregator#cleanup
list.description: Cleans up any resources used by the aggregator.

list.title: OutputAggregator#saveOutput
list.description: Saves the aggregated content to the output file with normalization.

list.title: PerformanceBenchmark
list.description: A class for measuring and reporting performance metrics in Node.js applications. Tracks execution time and memory usage for named operations.

list.title: PerformanceBenchmark#endMetric
list.description: Ends timing for a metric and records results.

list.title: ProgressTracker#complete
list.description: Marks the progress as complete and logs the final statistics.

list.title: ProgressTracker#displayProgress
list.description: Displays the current progress in the console.

list.title: ProgressTracker#updateProgress
list.description: Updates the progress tracker with the size of the recently processed file.

list.title: StreamProcessor#processLargeFile
list.description: Processes a large file, optionally truncating content based on maxBufferSize and maxLines, and normalizing the content.

list.title: configureHighlightJs
list.description: Configures highlight.js with commonly used programming languages

list.title: createAsciiSeparator
list.description: Creates an ASCII art separator with a centered label.

list.title: generateBanner
list.description: Generates a full ASCII block art banner
